comments.body:
This feature will be available in the next npm release of Base UI.

In the meantime, you can try it out on our Canary release channel:

```sh
npm i https://pkg.pr.new/@base-ui-components/react@1741
```

labels.description: Expand the scope of the product to solve a new problem.

labels.description: Changes related to the navigation menu component.
